source_notes: Lightweight subjective coaching/team-staff layer. This is not a hard data feed; it translates manager pedigree, tournament experience, tactical clarity, squad fit, and game-management confidence into a small rating nudge.
Adjustment scale is intentionally capped around -0.4 to +1.0 rating points so coaching can affect tight matches without overwhelming player quality, rankings, recent results, or venue context.
Use this as a reviewable model input. Update as coaching situations, tournament reports, or tactical evidence changes.

adjustments.note: Long-running tournament staff and proven knockout management.
Elite club pedigree and strong tactical/game-management upside.
